title: 🔤 Entropy-Language Hybrids
name: Entropy-Language Hybrids
what_it_is: Languages that decay as they’re spoken—syntax that collapses mid-use, grammar that fragments under meaning pressure.
how_to_use: she speaks in entropy-script—each word more unstable than the last
his tongue unravels language—sentences die as they’re born
animation_behavior: Words flicker then fade, letters disintegrate into particles, voice trails off into symbol static ---
